changeSet.author: sumicare
changeSet.sql: UPDATE services_catalogue SET price = CASE code WHEN 'FOOT_REFLEX' THEN 900 WHEN 'SHIATSU' THEN 900 WHEN 'SWEDISH' THEN 900 WHEN 'DEEP_TISSUE' THEN 900 WHEN 'LOMI_LOMI' THEN 900 WHEN 'LYMPHATIC' THEN 900 WHEN 'COMBINATION' THEN 900 WHEN 'SALT_GLOW_SCRUB' THEN 1000 WHEN 'DAEMIDI' THEN 1150 WHEN 'THAI' THEN 1150 WHEN 'MILK_BATH_SCRUB' THEN 1200 WHEN 'AROMA_REFLEX' THEN 1350 WHEN 'VENTOSA' THEN 1650 WHEN 'TANDEM' THEN 1900 ELSE price END WHERE organization_id = (SELECT id FROM organizations WHERE slug = 'lasema') AND code IN ('FOOT_REFLEX','SHIATSU','SWEDISH','DEEP_TISSUE','LOMI_LOMI','LYMPHATIC','COMBINATION', 'SALT_GLOW_SCRUB','DAEMIDI','THAI','MILK_BATH_SCRUB','AROMA_REFLEX','VENTOSA','TANDEM');

changeSet.author: sumicare
